series_metadata.series_title: Underground Storage Tank Registration and Permit Files
series_metadata.series_description: File contains the application, correspondence, annual renewals, facility construction documents, proof of financial responsibility, ownership validation, federal registration forms, and other support documents required for underground storage tank facilities to operate in Ohio.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Microform: in office permanently or file is converted a machine readable format ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable records permanently. ; Paper: paper copy in operating area converted machine readable format. Upon confirmation machine readable records have been checked quality and completeness, paper copy
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
